name: connect_debug_port
short_description: Connect nets and pins to debug port channels
full_help:
connect_debug_port

Description: 
Connect nets and pins to debug port channels

Syntax: 
connect_debug_port  [-channel_start_index <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <port>
                    <nets>...

Usage: 
  Name                    Description
  -----------------------------------
  [-channel_start_index]  Connect nets starting at channel index
  [-quiet]                Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]              Suspend message limits during command execution
  <port>                  Debug port name
  <nets>                  List of nets or pins

Categories: 
Debug, XDC

arguments.description: Connect nets starting at channel index
Suspend message limits during command execution
